title: knautia timeroyi subsp. carpophylax
intro: Knautia timeroyi subsp. carpophylax, also known as the Shepherd's Needle, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils. The health benefits of Knautia timeroyi subsp. carpophylax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine for its supposed benefits in treating various health conditions.
